title: Libraton 16" Rivet Nut Tool, Rivet Nut Gun, Hand Rivet Nut Setter with 70PCS Rivet Nuts, 7PCS Metric Interchangeable Mandrels and Carrying Case, Easy Replace
features: 【COMPLETE ACCESSORIES】The rivet nut tool kit includes an rivet nut gun, 7PCS interchangeable mandrels(Metric: M3, M4, M5, M6, M8, M10, M12), 10 each of 7 specification nuts, and a blow molding storage box.

【EASY FOR USE】The Cr-Mo replaceable mandrels of Libraton rivet nut are color-coded for quick matching when used. The innovative structure of the mandrels can be quickly replaced without the extra tools, saving time.
【STURDY AND DURABLE】The rivet nut tool is made of carbon steel with high-strength heat treated finish for long lasting. Contains a blow-molded box for easy storage to avoid loss and damage.
【ERGONOMIC HANDLE】The 16 inch longer handle with larger leverage inside for force-saving. Equipped with TPR shock-proof, making you feel comfortable even in long-time use.
【WIDE APPLICATIONS】The hand rivet nut gun is perfect for a wide range of riveting applications, such as automobile body panels, sheet metal, plastic parts, riveted wood, furniture, decorative items.
description: Product Description Libraton rivet nut tool is perfect for a wide range of riveting applications. The quick-change head design allows for easy changing of mandrels. 16-inch carbon steel arms and ergonomic handles can achieve maximizing leverage, saving 25% of grip strength.
